# External Reference Repositories

This folder is for third-party reference repositories used via adapters.

Repositories are not committed to this project history. Fetch them locally with:

```bash
bash /Users/seongcheoljeong/Documents/Codex_test/scripts/fetch_references.sh
```

Expected directories after fetch:

- `/Users/seongcheoljeong/Documents/Codex_test/external/HybridDynamicRT`
- `/Users/seongcheoljeong/Documents/Codex_test/external/sionna`
- `/Users/seongcheoljeong/Documents/Codex_test/external/radarsimpy`

Pinned local checkout SHAs are recorded in:

- `/Users/seongcheoljeong/Documents/Codex_test/external/reference-locks.md`
